productDisplayName: Jealous 21 Women Sleevless Black V Nech Top
description: CompositionBlack round neck, sleeveless blouson top made of cotton, with a complete flannel around the neck and split at the chest, metal faceted embellishments in mesh along the neckline, elasticated below the bust line and pleated at the waistFittingRegularWash care Machine or hand wash separately Use mild detergent only Do not bleach or wring Use mild detergent only Dry in shade Medium iron Perfect for those weekend parties, this black top from jealous 21 is stylish to the hilt. The flannel along the neckline mildly covering your arms adds to it a firtatious touch while making your arms look slimmer and longer. Rouched at the bust and pleated at the waist, this top accentuates your countours perfectly. Team this with skin tight jeans or skirts and stylish footwear available at myntra, and rock the party!Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
